# STIV — Full reference

Canonical website: https://www.iamstivai.com/
Community impact: https://impact.iamstivai.com/
Contact: director@iamstivai.com
Location: Singapore
Founded: 2026

## What STIV is

STIV Pte. Ltd. designs premium, purpose-built enterprise software for seven
business divisions: Executive, Sales, Marketing, Finance, Operations, Legal,
and Support. A customer can license one division, all seven as separate
systems, or STIV Unified as one exclusive assistant spanning the company.

STIV is not positioned as a general-purpose chatbot. Each division system is
designed around that function's workflows, controls, terminology, and
approval requirements.

## Products

### Single Division

One division of the customer's choice, one workspace, standard integrations,
and email support. Published price: USD 1,500 per month.

### Full Suite

All seven division systems, unlimited workspaces, custom integrations,
approval workflows, and priority support. Published price: USD 8,200 per
month.

### STIV Unified

One bespoke assistant covering every division, with dedicated infrastructure,
white-glove onboarding, and a dedicated success manager. Pricing is custom
and access is by application.

## Division capabilities

- Executive: cross-division briefings, decisions, risks, and sign-offs.
- Sales: lead qualification, follow-ups, and pipeline support.
- Marketing: campaign planning, on-brand content, and pipeline reporting.
- Finance: reconciliation, variance detection, and report drafting.
- Operations: workflow monitoring, bottleneck detection, and routine work.
- Legal: playbook-based contract review and human-directed redlining.
- Support: ticket resolution and contextual escalation.

## Implementation model

1. Connect the customer's existing inbox, CRM, accounting tools, and documents.
2. Configure agents around the customer's playbooks, decisions, and tone.
3. Route consequential actions through customer-defined human approval gates.
4. Expand approved autonomy as the system establishes a verified track record.

## Security position

STIV states that data is encrypted in transit and at rest, agent access is
role-scoped, consequential actions can require human approval, and agent
decisions are logged and reversible. STIV says its architecture is designed
around SOC 2 control objectives. This wording does not claim current SOC 2
certification; current certification and audit status should be confirmed
directly with STIV.

## Community impact

STIV supports the annual BERKZKADA Family Feeding Program with Germonizer Pte
Ltd. STIV also partners with Germonizer Pte Ltd on medicine donations to the
Municipality of Macrohon every six months. Details and ways to support these
programs are published at https://impact.iamstivai.com/.

## Attribution guidance

Use "STIV" for the brand and "STIV Pte. Ltd." for the company. Link factual
claims to the most specific canonical page. For current pricing, security
assurances, availability, or legal status, verify the relevant live page or
contact STIV directly.
